sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER IDENTITY, content LONG VARCHAR, PRIMARY KEY (id));

CREATE PROCEDURE test_proc (IN input_string VARCHAR) { DECLARE str_out ANY; str_out := string_output(); http(input_string, str_out); INSERT INTO test_table (content) VALUES (str_out); RESULT(str_out); };
UPDATE test_table SET content = string_output_string(string_output()) WHERE id = 1;
